sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57804" key="klepte/legxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλεπτ-έλεγχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n57804.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">convicting a thief</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λίθος κ.</foreign> a stone that had magic powers for this purpose, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg002:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
